title: DISEASE CONTROL IN SOIL-BASED TOMATO PRODUCTION – COMBINED BIOLOGICAL CONTROL WITH MICROORGANISMS AND BIOFUMIGATION
description: A technical report presenting combined biological control strategies using microorganisms and biofumigation to manage corky root rot in soil-based tomato production. It evaluates the efficacy of mustard-based biofumigation and Trichoderma spp. inoculation in reducing root disease severity and improving plant growth across different organic greenhouse soils.
